data.title: OpenAI's Chinese Cousins Alibaba, And ByteDance Are Slashing AI Costs And Defying US Chip Sanctions: Beijing's Strength Is To 'Build Fast, Build Reliably And Build Cheap'
data.description: Chinese AI companies, including 01.ai, Alibaba, and ByteDance, are significantly reducing AI model costs by optimizing hardware, hiring cheaper talent, and cutting inference costs by over 90%, despite challenges posed by U.S. chip sanctions.
